members.title: Comparing YOLOv5 Variants for Vehicle Detection: A Performance Analysis
members.abstract_snippet: Vehicle detection is an important task in the management of traffic and automatic vehicles. This study provides a comparative analysis of five YOLOv5 variants, YOLOv5n6s, YOLOv5s6s, YOLOv5m6s, YOLOv5l6s, and YOLOv5x6s, for vehicle detection in various environments.
